feat_fig_fighting_style.name: Fighting Style
feat_fig_fighting_style.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one option (Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, etc.).

feat_fig_second_wind.name: Second Wind
feat_fig_second_wind.description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm. On your turn, you can use a bonus action to regain HP equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.

feat_fig_action_surge.name: Action Surge
feat_fig_action_surge.description: You can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action on top of your regular action and a possible bonus action.

feat_fig_archetype.name: Martial Archetype
feat_fig_archetype.description: You choose an archetype that strives to perfect your martial prowess. Your choice grants features at 3rd, 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level.

feat_fig_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_fig_extra_attack.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn. The number of attacks increases to three at 11th level and four at 20th level.

feat_fig_indomitable.name: Indomitable
feat_fig_indomitable.description: You can reroll a saving throw that you fail. If you do so, you must use the new roll, and you can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

feat_fig_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement
feat_fig_asi.description: You can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1.

feat_aa_lore.name: Arcane Archer Lore
feat_aa_lore.description: You gain proficiency in either the Arcana or Nature skill, and you learn the Prestidigitation or Druidcraft cantrip.

feat_aa_shot.name: Arcane Shot
feat_aa_shot.description: Once per turn when you fire an arrow from a shortbow or longbow, you can apply one of your Arcane Shot options to that arrow. You have two uses of this ability.

feat_aa_magic_arrow.name: Magic Arrow
feat_aa_magic_arrow.description: Whenever you fire a nonmagical arrow from a shortbow or longbow, you can make it magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks.

feat_aa_curving_shot.name: Curving Shot
feat_aa_curving_shot.description: When you make an attack roll with a magic arrow and miss, you can use a bonus action to reroll the attack roll against a different target within 60 feet of the original.

feat_aa_ready_shot.name: Ever-Ready Shot
feat_aa_ready_shot.description: If you roll initiative and have no uses of Arcane Shot left, you regain one use of it.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: An expert in blending elven archery with powerful arcane magic.
